mapper.sql: select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.subject_id, c.description, c.objectives, c.syllabus, c.cover_image, c.status, c.enrollment_start_time, c.enrollment_end_time, c.enrollment_status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.remark, s.subject_name from edu_course c left join edu_subject s on c.subject_id = s.subject_id
mapper.select: SELECT teacher_id FROM edu_course_teacher WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN role = 'main' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.subject_id, c.description, c.objectives, c.syllabus, c.cover_image, c.status, c.enrollment_start_time, c.enrollment_end_time, c.enrollment_status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.remark, s.subject_name, (select GROUP_CONCAT(u.nickname) from sys_user u where u.user_id in ( select t.user_id from edu_course_teacher ct inner join edu_teacher t on ct.teacher_id = t.teacher_id where ct.course_id = c.course_id and ct.role = 'main' ) ) as teacher_name, (select count(1) from edu_course_student cs where cs.course_id = c.course_id ) as student_count from edu_course c left join edu_subject s on c.subject_id = s.subject_id where c.course_id = #{courseId} and c.del_flag = 0

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.subject_id, c.description, c.objectives, c.syllabus, c.cover_image, c.status, c.enrollment_start_time, c.enrollment_end_time, c.enrollment_status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.remark, s.subject_name, (select count(1) from edu_course_student cs where cs.course_id = c.course_id ) as student_count from edu_course c left join edu_subject s on c.subject_id = s.subject_id inner join edu_course_teacher ct on c.course_id = ct.course_id where c.del_flag = 0 and ct.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by c.create_time desc

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.subject_id, c.description, c.objectives, c.syllabus, c.cover_image, c.status, c.enrollment_start_time, c.enrollment_end_time, c.enrollment_status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.remark, s.subject_name, (select GROUP_CONCAT(u.nickname) from sys_user u where u.user_id in ( select t.user_id from edu_course_teacher ct inner join edu_teacher t on ct.teacher_id = t.teacher_id where ct.course_id = c.course_id and ct.role = 'main' ) ) as teacher_name, cs.progress, (select count(1) from edu_course_student cs_count where cs_count.course_id = c.course_id ) as student_count from edu_course c inner join edu_course_student cs on c.course_id = cs.course_id left join edu_subject s on c.subject_id = s.subject_id where c.del_flag = 0 and cs.student_id = #{studentId} order by cs.last_learn_time desc, cs.join_time desc
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_resource WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
